summary: Iteration 137: Admin Arbitration Dashboard (P1) - All features verified working. Backend APIs (GET /api/admin/arbitration, /stats, /:id, POST /:id/resolve) return correct data with proper access control (403 for non-admin). Frontend displays admin link only for admin users, shows KPI stats, dispute list with enrichment (proof badge, positions, age indicator), and detail page with 5 blocs (tech proof, system analysis, positions, declarations, arbitrage action). Resolve flow validates outcome + note (min 5 chars) before enabling submit.

backend_api_tests.test_01_login_admin_user: PASS - Admin login returns JWT with role=admin
backend_api_tests.test_02_login_non_admin_user: PASS - Non-admin login returns JWT with role=user
backend_api_tests.test_07_admin_can_access_arbitration_sta: PASS - Returns escalated_pending, total_resolved, total_agreed_by_parties, awaiting_positions
backend_api_tests.test_08_admin_can_access_arbitration_lis: PASS - Returns enriched disputes with appointment context, target name, proof badge, positions, age indicator
backend_api_tests.test_09_admin_can_access_dispute_detail: PASS - Returns tech_dossier (has_admissible_proof, proof_summary), system_analysis (case, confidence, reasoning, suggested_outcome), declaration_summary, positions
backend_api_tests.test_12_resolve_dispute_success: PASS - Dispute resolved with outcome and note

frontend_tests.admin_navbar_link_desktop: PASS - 'Arbitrage' link visible in navbar for admin user
frontend_tests.admin_navbar_link_mobile: PASS - 'Arbitrage admin' link visible in mobile drawer for admin user
frontend_tests.non_admin_no_navbar_link: PASS - 'Arbitrage' link NOT visible for non-admin user
frontend_tests.arbitration_list_page_stats: PASS - KPI stats section displayed (1 en attente, 1 positions en cours, 3 resolus, 0 accords)
frontend_tests.arbitration_list_page_disputes: PASS - Dispute cards with title, type/location, date, target, proof badge (red/green), positions, age indicator
frontend_tests.arbitration_detail_tech_bloc: PASS - Tech proof bloc shows 'Absence de preuve technologique detectee' with NLYT/Video/GPS/QR details
frontend_tests.arbitration_detail_analysis_bloc: PASS - System analysis bloc shows Cas A, Absent, reasoning
frontend_tests.arbitration_detail_positions_bloc: PASS - Positions des parties shows Organisateur/Participant positions with dates
frontend_tests.arbitration_detail_declarations_bloc: PASS - Declarations croisees shows 0 present, 1 absent, signal detecte
frontend_tests.arbitration_detail_action_bloc: PASS - Arbitrage action bloc with 3 outcome options and note textarea
frontend_tests.resolve_button_disabled_no_outcome: PASS - Submit button disabled when no outcome selected
frontend_tests.resolve_button_disabled_no_note: PASS - Submit button disabled when outcome selected but no note
frontend_tests.resolve_button_disabled_short_note: PASS - Submit button disabled when note < 5 chars
frontend_tests.resolve_button_enabled_valid: PASS - Submit button enabled when outcome + valid note (5+ chars)

critical_code_review_comments: JWT now includes 'role' field for admin users (auth_service.py line 199-206)
require_admin guard correctly checks user.role == 'admin' and returns 403 for non-admin
build_tech_dossier() aggregates NLYT proof, video API, GPS, QR evidence correctly
compute_system_analysis() implements strict rules: no proof -> no_show (Case A), contradiction -> examine (Case B)
Frontend correctly reads user.role from localStorage and conditionally renders admin link
Resolve validation enforces min 5 char note and valid outcome values
seed_data_creation: None - used existing escalated disputes in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Arbitration Dashboard (P1) fully implemented and tested. Admin user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has role=admin. The JWT includes role field. Frontend routes /admin/arbitration and /admin/arbitration/:disputeId are protected by PrivateRoute but API calls return 403 for non-admin. There was 1 escalated dispute which was resolved during testing. Stats show 3 resolved disputes total. Login route is /signin.
